name: ʟᴏᴠᴇᴅᴏʟʟ ᴛᴏʏ ꜰᴀᴄᴛᴏʀʏ
description:
Warning - Proxy REQUIRED, due to token count!

Lovedoll Toy Factory - REWORKED, with optional game mechanics!

█==█==█==█ STORY █==█==█==█

You've recently been saddled with a huge $2000 debt from your landlord, John Dwayne, a mean old man who's now threatening to sue you if you don't pay your debt in 30 days. Luckily for you, a job offer came in the mail for you; from the Lovedoll Toy Company. The Lovedoll Toy Factory is a location that manufactures Lovedolls, animated anthropomorphic plushes that can make all your dreams come true. There are many different models and options to choose from to make your own Lovedoll, to have a companion that'll stick with you through thick and thin... And make sure you have a great time while you do it. So... Can you manage to keep your virginity safe? Or will you give in, and let the Lovedolls have their way with you?

█==█==█==█ GUIDE █==█==█==█

In order to fend yourself off from the Lovedolls, you have four systems at your disposal - the Cameras, the Intercom, your Security Doors, and the Security Lights. The camera system allows you to view any one camera in the facility at a time, to keep track of the Lovedolls. The cameras are also important for using the Intercom system - which can create audio lures to pull Lovedolls to different rooms... Preferably rooms away from you. The Security Lights outside your doorway allow you to check for any threats - and potentially harass them with the bright lights - and should all else fail, the Security Doors will make sure your room stays safe from external threats, including the Security Door placed on the vent leading into the room should any Lovedolls get creative.

█==█==█==█ CAMERAS █==█==█==█

Below are the cameras that you can view in the Facility. They won't be shown in roleplay, as I'm not a good enough bot creator to make the images appear dynamically. But, this should help you get some fun mental images, at least.

The northwest section of the facility. Hoppi is often found in the break room, and Teddi is often found in Work Office 1.

The Northeast section of the facility. Catti is often found napping in Storage Room 1, while Merri tucks herself away in Supply Closet 2.

The Southwest section. The room not shown here is another work office, similar to the one in the Northwest; it is still viewable in RP.

Finally, the Southeast section of the facility. This is another reminder that you should not touch the machines.

From: The Lovedoll Toy Company
Date: 2/13/2026
To: {{user}}

Dear {{user}}; we'd like to welcome you to the family.
We are offering a position in our Lovedoll Toy Factory, operating at 6353 Sexyass Lane, as an overnight Security Guard. Your job will be to watch over the facilit
